message: fix: reject unsupported observer comment targets

files.patch:
@@ -349,6 +349,10 @@ describe("parseAgentMarkdown", () => {
 				"observers:
  - agent: metacognitive
    target: root
    events: [plan_end]
    trigger:
      every: 1
      event: plan_end
    comments:
      can_message: [root]
      default_recipient: caller",
 				/default_recipient.*can_message/,
 			],
+			[
+				"observers:
  - agent: metacognitive
    target: root
    events: [plan_end]
    trigger:
      every: 1
      event: plan_end
    comments:
      can_message: [target]
      default_recipient: target",
+				/must be root or caller/,
+			],
 			[
 				"observe_delegates:
  - agent: metacognitive
    trigger: every_turn
    events: [act_end]",
 				/observe_delegates\[0\]\.trigger.*on_delegate_final/,
